# Forkear

> Technology company founded in Patagonia, Argentina. We build custom software, IoT solutions, blockchain systems, AI agents, and more — for clients worldwide.

## About

Forkear is a technology company based in Patagonia, Argentina. The name comes from the Unix `fork()` process — the system's ability to split and run multiple tasks in parallel. We operate across disciplines, contexts and industries without losing focus or quality in any of them.

We don't just solve the problem you bring us. We have the ability to see what others miss: opportunities that don't have a name yet, problems you don't know you have yet.

## Services

- **Web Development**: Web apps, REST APIs, reactive frontends, robust backends
- **Custom Software**: Systems, scripts and automations tailored to specific problems
- **IoT & Networking**: Firmware, connected devices, network protocols, M2M architectures
- **Blockchain / Web3**: Smart contracts, tokens, wallets, decentralized network integration
- **AI & Agents**: AI pipelines, language models, autonomous agent orchestrators
- **Consulting**: Systems architecture, technical audits, strategic IT advisory

## Contact

- Website: https://forkear.com
- Contact: https://forkear.com/#contacto
